# Py3o Factur-x Invoice

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:9e479c65ac12bcbd8cbc70379a7929de04360f862b8ae82c0fc710ad1a83b259
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

If you use the py3o reporting engine (module *report_py3o* from the [reporting-engine](https://github.com/OCA/reporting-engine) OCA project) to generate your PDF invoices and you want these PDF invoices to be Factur-X invoices (i.e. a PDF invoice with an embedded XML file in CII format), this module is for you ! Factur-X is the e-invoicing standard for France and Germany (in Germany, it is also called ZUGFeRD 2.1).
